keyRules: No more than 120 m above ground level (EASA Open category)
Register as a UAS user (€30 for 3 years or €100 for 5 years) if your drone weighs at least 250 g or is equipped with a camera
A1/A3 Online Training Required – Minimum Age 16
Always maintain visual line of sight (VLOS) with the drone
Never fly over people, crowds, or public events
Follow the restrictions for airport CTRs and UAS airspace zones — check Droneinfo.fi
Night flights are permitted if the drone has a green flashing identification light and visibility is sufficient
There are flight restrictions near the eastern border—check the affected areas before flying
In Lapland, there may be seasonal restrictions in reindeer herding areas
Check Droneinfo.fi for area-specific restrictions and altitude limits
importantNotes: Registration costs 30 € for 3 years or 100 € for 5 years
The Eastern Border (EFR100) zone is active 24 hours a day — now visible on the map
Traficom's UAS zones and Natura 2000 areas are shown on the map
In winter, battery capacity decreases in freezing temperatures
The White Night: Long flight times, but be sure to check the restricted areas
Data protection legislation (GDPR) applies to the photographing of identifiable individuals

fields.disclaimerText: Always check Traficom’s official sources and Droneinfo.fi before flying. This app is a tool—not an official authority. Finland complies with EASA regulations, with additional national requirements.
